{{Quote|Analysis of intelligence gathered on the Gree worlds of Asation and Lonatro corroborates eyewitness accounts of Count Dooku's presence there.|[[Armand Isard/Legends|Armand Isard]]|<ref name="HNN54">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|54|news/1352_1.html|Dooku Spotted in Gree Enclave}}</ref>}}
'''Lonatro''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] located within the [[Gree Enclave/Legends|Gree Enclave]] and served as the primary provider of foodstuffs to the [[Gree (species)/Legends|Gree]]. During the height of the Gree civilization, this world's surface was dominated by farms and food production facilities, but after the decline of the Gree, 90% of the planet's surface was given over to game preserves and botanical gardens. The few remaining parcels of land still provided food for the Enclave.<ref name="TGE" />

An average day on Lonatro was 22 standard hours with a year lasting 340 local days.<ref name="TGE" />
